[D1] (6:24-6:78) TS377038: This `Schema.Union` contains multiple `Schema.Literal` members and can be simplified to a single `Schema.Literal` call. effect(schemaUnionOfLiterals)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaUnionOfLiterals for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaUnionOfLiterals for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with a single Schema.Literal call"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable schemaUnionOfLiterals for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable schemaUnionOfLiterals for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with a single Schema.Literal call" ===

--- file:///.src/schemaUnionOfLiterals_preview.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics schemaUnionOfLiterals:warning
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const preview = Schema.Literal("a", "b")
